name: Kingdom of Tungning

colors.symbolism: the character 鄭 (Zheng), surname of the ruling House of Koxinga
the bordered circle enclosing the character

description: A white field bearing the Chinese character 鄭 (Zheng) — the surname of the ruling Zheng (Koxinga) house — set within a red-bordered circle at the centre.
history: Banner of the Kingdom of Tungning, the Ming-loyalist Zheng (Koxinga) regime that ruled southwestern Formosa and the Penghu islands from 1661 until its annexation by the Qing dynasty in 1683.
